text: Campus placement ki shortlist mein naam nahi dekha toh Kota wale dropper dino ki failure yaad aa gayi, par rone ka waqt nahi hai. Bapuji ne khet girvi rakh kar padhaya hai, toh ye 'dropper ka tag' aur thakan side mein rakh kar mujhe agli company ke aptitude test ke liye lagna hi padega. Main ruk nahi sakta kyunki first-gen student hone ke naate ghar ki poori umeed mujh par hai.

Aaj placement drive se reject hua toh joint family mein udne wale mazaak ka darr dimaag mein ghoomne laga ki main ek failed JEE dropout hoon. Sharma ji ke bete jaisa 'sarkari babu' banne ka pressure itna hai ki dimaag fat raha hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakta. Mujhe raat bhar jaag kar coding karni padegi taaki is baar cutoff clear ho aur parivaar ki izzat bach jaye.

Placement shortlist se bahar hona bilkul waisa hi laga jaise apne 3rd attempt mein NEET ki rank list se bahar hona, par mere paas haar manne ki luxury nahi hai. Andar se poori tarah toot chuka hoon aur ek 'kuch nahi hoga' wala mindset ban gaya hai, lekin is hostel ke chhote se kamre mein aaraam karne ki aukaat nahi hai meri. Agli company ki tayari karni hi hogi chahe kitna bhi dimaag kharab ho, kyunki mere rukkne ka matlab sab khatam hona hai.

Jab company ka rejection mail aaya toh wahi purani dropper shame wapas aa gayi, jaise main hamesha ek bojh hi rahunga apni aspirational family par. Unhone itna paisa lagaya hai ki main apni mental exhaustion aur identity crisis ko beech mein la hi nahi sakta. Mujhe chupchap doston ke saamne normal dikhna hai aur apne resume ko theek karke agle interview mein baithna hai, kyunki main afford nahi kar sakta ki main weak padun.

Placement drive mein select na hone par wo 2nd attempt wali failure ka zakhm phir hara ho gaya, par mere paas rone ka privilege kahan hai? Agar main yahan haar maan gaya toh sab bolenge ki isne pehle JEE mein rank nahi nikali aur ab engineering mein back paper jaisi halat kar li. Meri aankhein neend se jal rahi hain par mujhe uthkar agle round ke liye padhna padega kyunki is race mein rukne ka option mujhe nahi mila hai.
